message: My production cost is 50 per unit, so I will only sell if the price is at least 50.
Thanks for sharing. My budget is tight — I value this around 55, so I can't go much above that. Let's try to find a fair price that works for both of us, maybe around 52-53.

That worked out okay for both of us at 55. Honestly though, that's near my limit. Could we try settling a bit lower this round, maybe around 52? That way we both still profit and keep trading consistently.
Since my production cost is 50, 52 barely gives me any profit. Can we meet at 53 instead so it's worth it for me too?
53 only gives me tiny profit on my 50 cost. If we can do 54 this round, that's way more sustainable for all future trades.
54 is a stretch, but let's make it our steady price going forward. I value our partnership.
54 has been working well for both of us. Let's keep it steady there — consistent trades mean reliable profits for us both. I'll stick with 54 this round.
